variations: Default - Dark Mode (3 Columns, Full Content)
testPageStructure.notes: All 14 variations present and correctly wrapped. Loop Mode and Loop + Autoplay variations confirmed.

paddingRefactor.notes: Padding refactor complete. Section element has no py-* classes, container has py-18 md:py-23, and dark mode pseudo element has before:inset-y-0. Visual appearance maintained.

implementation.navigationAriaLabels: Previous Item / Next Item on nav buttons
implementation.autoplayToggle: Present with aria-label, toggles between pause/play labels
implementation.ariaLiveManagement: aria-live=off when playing, aria-live=polite when paused
implementation.focusPause: Autoplay pauses on focusin, resumes on focusout
implementation.loopModeHandling: Correctly filters duplicate slides from ARIA attributes

patternCompliance.notes: Full WAI-ARIA carousel pattern implemented. Swiper A11y module enabled. Custom updateSlideAriaAttributes function handles loop mode duplicates correctly.

autoplayFeatures.focusPause: Pauses on focusin, resumes on focusout if was playing

loopMode.ariaAttributes: Only real slides receive ARIA attributes, duplicates skipped
loopMode.notes: Loop mode correctly configured. Swiper creates duplicate slides for seamless looping, but ARIA attributes only applied to real slides.

autoplayToggleButton.icon: Pause.svg initially, toggles to play icon
autoplayToggleButton.functionality: Starts/stops autoplay, updates aria-label, toggles icon

ariaLive.implementation: Dynamically updated via JS on toggle

loopPlusAutoplay.notes: Combined loop + autoplay working correctly with full accessibility support.

codeReview.notes: Frontend JS implementation matches editor TSX. Swiper configuration consistent.

passedChecks: Test page contains exactly 14 takt/cards-carousel blocks
Section element has no vertical padding classes
Slide ARIA attributes correctly set (role=group, aria-roledescription=slide, aria-label with count)
Loop mode duplicate slides filtered from ARIA attributes
Navigation buttons have aria-label and title
Autoplay toggle button present with correct aria-label
aria-live management (off when playing, polite when paused)
Section aria-labelledby when heading present, aria-label fallback when empty
